rows.label: tlk70000008_03_msg0001
rows.name:
Our squad helped with
restoration, and I tell you,
their work was truly splendid!

rows.label: tlk70000008_03_msg0002
rows.name:
The difference in their daily
training was obvious.
Cruelly obvious.

rows.label: tlk70000008_03_msg0003
rows.name:
Point is, we didn't get thrashed
just cos the enemy was too
strong. We were too weak!

rows.label: tlk70000008_03_msg0004
rows.name:
'Course, I coulda told you that
in the first place! Gwahaha!

rows.label: tlk70000008_03_msg0005
rows.name:
Now we all know we've got a problem,
it's time to figure out how to fix it.
Won't be easy, but I'll do what I can!
